```{r comparacion_medidas_2022, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
medidas_2024 <- data.frame(
  'Medidas/departamento'=c("Distancia media",
                           "grado medio",
                           "Desviación estándar del grado",
                           "Número de clanes",
                           "Densidad",
                           "Transitividad",
                           "Asortatividad"),
    salud = c(mean_distance(g_bi_salud),
              mean(degree(g_bi_salud)),
              sd(degree(g_bi_salud)),
              count_max_cliques(g_bi_salud),
              edge_density(g_bi_salud),
              transitivity(g_bi_salud),
              assortativity(g_bi_salud, degree(g_bi_salud), 
                            directed = FALSE)),
    peticion = c(mean_distance(g_bi_peticion),
              mean(degree(g_bi_peticion)),
              sd(degree(g_bi_peticion)),
              count_max_cliques(g_bi_peticion),
              edge_density(g_bi_peticion),
              transitivity(g_bi_peticion),
              assortativity(g_bi_peticion, degree(g_bi_peticion), 
                            directed = FALSE)),
  proceso = c(mean_distance(g_bi_proceso),
              mean(degree(g_bi_proceso)),
              sd(degree(g_bi_proceso)),
              count_max_cliques(g_bi_proceso),
              edge_density(g_bi_proceso),
              transitivity(g_bi_proceso),
              assortativity(g_bi_proceso, degree(g_bi_proceso), 
                            directed = FALSE))
  )
  


medidas_2024 %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Resultados', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

#### Skipgramas

```{r skipgrama_2022, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
texto_DS2024_skip <- DS2022$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DS2024_skip <- texto_DS2024_skip %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = skipgram,
    input = text,
    token = "skip_ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    num_words = purrr::map_int(skipgram, wordcount)
  ) %>% 
  filter(num_words == 2) %>%  # Mantener solo bigramas
  select(-num_words) %>% 
  separate(
    skipgram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_salud,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_salud
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)

texto_DP2024_skip <- DP2022$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DP2024_skip <- texto_DP2024_skip %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = skipgram,
    input = text,
    token = "skip_ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    num_words = purrr::map_int(skipgram, wordcount)
  ) %>% 
  filter(num_words == 2) %>%  # Mantener solo bigramas
  select(-num_words) %>% 
  separate(
    skipgram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_peticion,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_peticion
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)

texto_DPr2024_skip <- DPr2022$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DPr2024_skip <- texto_DPr2024_skip %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = skipgram,
    input = text,
    token = "skip_ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    num_words = purrr::map_int(skipgram, wordcount)
  ) %>% 
  filter(num_words == 2) %>%  # Mantener solo bigramas
  select(-num_words) %>% 
  separate(
    skipgram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_proceso,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_proceso
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)


```

##### Salud

```{r skipgrama_salud_2022, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
texto_DS2024_skip %>% 
  head(n = 10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable(caption = 'Top 10 skipgramas más frecuentes') %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

```{r grafos_skipgrama_salud_2022, echo=FALSE, fig.height=14, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Crear objeto de red a partir de bigramas con peso mayor a 2
g_skip_salud <- texto_DS2024_skip %>%
  filter(weight > 4) %>%
  graph_from_data_frame(directed = FALSE)

V(g_skip_salud)$cluster <- components(graph = g_skip_salud)$membership

# Extraer la componente conexa más grande
gcc_skip_salud <- induced_subgraph(
  graph = g_skip_salud, 
  vids = which(V(g_skip_salud)$cluster == which.max(components(graph = g_skip_salud)$csize))
)

# Configuración de gráficos para mostrar dos visualizaciones
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(1, 1, 2, 1), mgp = c(1, 1, 1))

# Visualización 1: Componente conexa sin peso ajustado
set.seed(123)
plot(
  gcc_skip_salud, 
  layout = layout_with_fr, 
  vertex.color = 1, 
  vertex.frame.color = 1, 
  vertex.size = 3, 
  vertex.label.color = 'black', 
  vertex.label.cex = 0.9, 
  vertex.label.dist = 1
)

# Visualización 2: Componente conexa con tamaño de vértice por fuerza y ancho de borde por peso
set.seed(123)
plot(
  gcc_skip_salud, 
  layout = layout_with_fr, 
  vertex.color = adjustcolor('darkolivegreen4', 0.1), 
  vertex.frame.color = 'darkolivegreen4', 
  vertex.size = 2 + 6 * (log1p(strength(gcc_skip_salud)) / max(log1p(strength(gcc_skip_salud)))), 
  vertex.label.color = 'black', 
  vertex.label.cex = 0.9, 
  vertex.label.dist = 1, 
  edge.width = 3 * E(g_skip_salud)$weight / max(E(g_skip_salud)$weight)
)

# Título para la visualización completa
title(main = "Componente conexa, umbral = 5", outer = TRUE, line = -1)
```

```{r comparacion_medidas_skip_2022, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
medidas_2024 <- data.frame(
  'Medidas/departamento'=c("Distancia media",
                           "grado medio",
                           "Desviación estándar del grado",
                           "Número de clanes",
                           "Densidad",
                           "Transitividad",
                           "Asortatividad"),
    salud = c(mean_distance(g_skip_salud),
              mean(degree(g_skip_salud)),
              sd(degree(g_skip_salud)),
              count_max_cliques(g_skip_salud),
              edge_density(g_skip_salud),
              transitivity(g_skip_salud),
              assortativity(g_skip_salud, degree(g_skip_salud), 
                            directed = FALSE)),
    peticion = c(mean_distance(g_skip_peticion),
              mean(degree(g_skip_peticion)),
              sd(degree(g_skip_peticion)),
              count_max_cliques(g_skip_peticion),
              edge_density(g_skip_peticion),
              transitivity(g_skip_peticion),
              assortativity(g_skip_peticion, degree(g_skip_peticion), 
                            directed = FALSE)),
  proceso = c(mean_distance(g_skip_proceso),
              mean(degree(g_skip_proceso)),
              sd(degree(g_skip_proceso)),
              count_max_cliques(g_skip_proceso),
              edge_density(g_skip_proceso),
              transitivity(g_skip_proceso),
              assortativity(g_skip_proceso, degree(g_skip_proceso), 
                            directed = FALSE))
  )
  


medidas_2024 %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Resultados', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

### 2023

#### Unigramas

```{r text_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#### 2023 -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Leer archivo Excel 2023
DS2023 <- read_excel("Corte_Constitucional_Relatoria_DS_2023.xlsx", 
    range = "A11:X153")
# Limpiar columna resumen 2023
DS2023 <- DS2023 %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c('...3','...4','...5'))
texto_DS2023 <- DS2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim()
texto_DS2023 <- tibble(
  line = seq_along(texto_DS2023),   # Crear índice de línea
  text = texto_DS2023               # Texto original, línea por línea
)
texto_DS2023 <- texto_DS2023 %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    input = text,
    output = word
  ) %>%
  
  # Eliminar NA
  filter(!is.na(word)) 


texto_DS2023 <- texto_DS2023 %>%
  
  # Convertir a minúsculas
  mutate(word = str_to_lower(word)) %>%
  
  # Eliminar tildes y diacríticos
  mutate(word = stringi::stri_trans_general(word, "Latin-ASCII")) %>%
  
  # Eliminar números
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[0-9]+")) %>%
  
  # Eliminar signos de puntuación y símbolos especiales
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[[:punct:]]")) %>%
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[^[:alnum:] ]")) %>%
  
  filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>% 
  
  # Eliminar espacios vacíos
  filter(word != "") %>%
  
  # Eliminar stopwords
  filter(
    !word %in% mis_stopwords_salud
  ) 

texto_DS2023 %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%     # Contar ocurrencias y ordenar de mayor a menor
  head(n = 10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable(caption = 'Top 10 tokens más frecuentes') %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
#### 2023 -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Leer archivo Excel 2023
DP2023 <- read_excel("Corte_Constitucional_Relatoria_DP_2023.xlsx", 
    range = "A11:X153")
# Limpiar columna resumen 2023
DP2023 <- DP2023 %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c('...3','...4','...5'))
texto_DP2023 <- DP2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim()
texto_DP2023 <- tibble(
  line = seq_along(texto_DP2023),   # Crear índice de línea
  text = texto_DP2023               # Texto original, línea por línea
)
texto_DP2023 <- texto_DP2023 %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    input = text,
    output = word
  ) %>%
  
  # Eliminar NA
  filter(!is.na(word)) 


texto_DP2023 <- texto_DP2023 %>%
  
  # Convertir a minúsculas
  mutate(word = str_to_lower(word)) %>%
  
  # Eliminar tildes y diacríticos
  mutate(word = stringi::stri_trans_general(word, "Latin-ASCII")) %>%
  
  # Eliminar números
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[0-9]+")) %>%
  
  # Eliminar signos de puntuación y símbolos especiales
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[[:punct:]]")) %>%
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[^[:alnum:] ]")) %>%
  
  filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>% 
  
  # Eliminar espacios vacíos
  filter(word != "") %>%
  
  # Eliminar stopwords
  filter(
    !word %in% mis_stopwords_peticion
  ) 

texto_DP2023 %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%     # Contar ocurrencias y ordenar de mayor a menor
  head(n = 10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable(caption = 'Top 10 tokens más frecuentes') %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()

#### 2023 -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Leer archivo Excel 2023
DPr2023 <- read_excel("Corte_Constitucional_Relatoria_DPr_2023.xlsx", 
    range = "A11:X117")
# Limpiar columna resumen 2023
DPr2023 <- DPr2023 %>% 
  dplyr::select(-c('...3','...4','...5'))
texto_DPr2023 <- DPr2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim()
texto_DPr2023 <- tibble(
  line = seq_along(texto_DPr2023),   # Crear índice de línea
  text = texto_DPr2023               # Texto original, línea por línea
)
texto_DPr2023 <- texto_DPr2023 %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    input = text,
    output = word
  ) %>%
  
  # Eliminar NA
  filter(!is.na(word)) 


texto_DPr2023 <- texto_DPr2023 %>%
  
  # Convertir a minúsculas
  mutate(word = str_to_lower(word)) %>%
  
  # Eliminar tildes y diacríticos
  mutate(word = stringi::stri_trans_general(word, "Latin-ASCII")) %>%
  
  # Eliminar números
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[0-9]+")) %>%
  
  # Eliminar signos de puntuación y símbolos especiales
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[[:punct:]]")) %>%
  mutate(word = str_remove_all(word, "[^[:alnum:] ]")) %>%
  
  filter(str_detect(word, "^[a-z]+$")) %>% 
  
  # Eliminar espacios vacíos
  filter(word != "") %>%
  
  # Eliminar stopwords
  filter(
    !word %in% mis_stopwords_proceso
  ) 

texto_DPr2023 %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%     # Contar ocurrencias y ordenar de mayor a menor
  head(n = 10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable(caption = 'Top 10 tokens más frecuentes') %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()

```

```{r wordcloud_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#### 2023 -------------------------------------------------------------------
par(mfrow=c(1,2))
texto_DS2023 %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  with(wordcloud(
    words = word,
    freq = n,
    max.words = 20,
    colors = rainbow(20)
  ))
title(main = "Derecho a la salud 2023")
texto_DP2023 %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  with(wordcloud(
    words = word,
    freq = n,
    max.words = 20,
    colors = rainbow(20)
  ))
title(main = "Derecho petición 2023")
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
texto_DPr2023 %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  with(wordcloud(
    words = word,
    freq = n,
    max.words = 20,
    colors = rainbow(20)
  ))
title(main = "Debido proceso 2023")

```

```{r palabras_comun_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tokens_totales <- bind_rows(
  list(
    salud = texto_DS2023,
    peticion = texto_DP2023,
    proceso = texto_DPr2023
  ),
  .id = "tema"
)
set.seed(1858)
tokens_totales %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE) %>%
  with(wordcloud(
    words = word,
    freq = n,
    max.words = 20,
    colors = rainbow(20)
  ))
title(main = "Palabras en común Derecho de salud, petición y debido proceso")

```
```{r frecuencias_palabras_comun_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tokens_totales %>%
  count(tema, word) %>%
  group_by(tema) %>%
  mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%         # Calcular proporción relativa por autor
  select(-n) %>%
  spread(tema, proportion, fill = 0) -> frec  # Convertir a formato ancho

# Reordenar columnas
frec %<>%
  select(word, salud, peticion, proceso) 

frec %>% 
  filter(salud != 0, peticion != 0, proceso != 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(salud), desc(peticion),desc(proceso)) -> frec_comun

frec_comun %>% head(10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Frecuencia palabras en común', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

```{r palabras distintas_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tokens_totales %>%
  distinct(tema, word) %>%
  count(word) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  head(10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Frecuencia palabras distintas', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```
```{r correlacion_total_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# vocabulario total
tabla_p <- tibble::tibble(
  comparacion = c(
    "salud vs peticion",
    "salud vs proceso",
    "proceso vs peticion"
  ),
  p_value = c(
    cor.test(frec$salud, frec$peticion)$p.value,
    cor.test(frec$salud, frec$proceso)$p.value,
    cor.test(frec$proceso, frec$peticion)$p.value
  ),
  Estimacion=c(
    cor.test(frec$salud, frec$peticion)$estimate,
    cor.test(frec$salud, frec$proceso)$estimate,
    cor.test(frec$proceso, frec$peticion)$estimate
  )
)

tabla_p %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Correlación vocabulario total', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()

library(boot)

cor_func_DS_DP <- function(data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]
  return(cor(d$salud, d$peticion))
}

cor_func_DS_DPr <- function(data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]
  return(cor(d$salud, d$proceso))
}

cor_func_DPr_DP <- function(data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]
  return(cor(d$proceso, d$peticion))
}

# ---------- Preparar datos ----------
data_cor_comun <- frec %>% 
  select(salud, peticion, proceso)

# ---------- Ejecutar bootstrap ----------
set.seed(418)
boot_cor_comun_DS_DP <- boot(data = data_cor_comun, 
                       statistic = cor_func_DS_DP, 
                       R = 2000)
boot_cor_comun_DS_DPr <- boot(data = data_cor_comun, 
                       statistic = cor_func_DS_DPr, 
                       R = 2000)
boot_cor_comun_DPr_DP <- boot(data = data_cor_comun, 
                       statistic = cor_func_DPr_DP, 
                       R = 2000)

# Histogramas

hist(boot_cor_comun_DS_DP$t, 
     main = "Distribución bootstrap de la correlación (Salud vs Petición)", 
     xlab = "r", 
     col = "steelblue", 
     border = "white")

hist(boot_cor_comun_DS_DPr$t, 
     main = "Distribución bootstrap de la correlación (Salud vs Proceso)", 
     xlab = "r", 
     col = "steelblue", 
     border = "white")

hist(boot_cor_comun_DPr_DP$t, 
     main = "Distribución bootstrap de la correlación (Proceso vs Petición)", 
     xlab = "r", 
     col = "steelblue", 
     border = "white")

# ---------- Intervalo de confianza bootstrap ----------
tabla_p <- tibble::tibble(
  comparacion = c(
    "salud vs peticion",
    "salud vs proceso",
    "proceso vs peticion"
  ),
  Intervalo = c(
    paste(round(
      boot.ci(boot_cor_comun_DS_DP, type = "perc")$percent[c(4,5)],3
    ),
          collapse = ','),
    paste(round(
      boot.ci(boot_cor_comun_DS_DPr, type = "perc")$percent[c(4,5)],3
    ),
          collapse = ','),
    paste(round(
      boot.ci(boot_cor_comun_DPr_DP, type = "perc")$percent[c(4,5)],3
    ),
          collapse = ',')
  )
)

tabla_p %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Correlación vocabulario total', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()


```

```{r correlacion_comun_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# vocabulario en común
tabla_p <- tibble::tibble(
  comparacion = c(
    "salud vs peticion",
    "salud vs proceso",
    "proceso vs peticion"
  ),
  p_value = c(
    cor.test(frec_comun$salud, frec_comun$peticion)$p.value,
    cor.test(frec_comun$salud, frec_comun$proceso)$p.value,
    cor.test(frec_comun$proceso, frec_comun$peticion)$p.value
  ),
  Estimacion=c(
    cor.test(frec_comun$salud, frec_comun$peticion)$estimate,
    cor.test(frec_comun$salud, frec_comun$proceso)$estimate,
    cor.test(frec_comun$proceso, frec_comun$peticion)$estimate
  )
)

tabla_p %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Correlación vocabulario en común', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()

# ---------- Preparar datos ----------
data_cor_comun <- frec_comun %>% 
  select(salud, peticion, proceso)

set.seed(418)
boot_cor_comun_DS_DP <- boot(data = data_cor_comun, 
                       statistic = cor_func_DS_DP, 
                       R = 2000)
boot_cor_comun_DS_DPr <- boot(data = data_cor_comun, 
                       statistic = cor_func_DS_DPr, 
                       R = 2000)
boot_cor_comun_DPr_DP <- boot(data = data_cor_comun, 
                       statistic = cor_func_DPr_DP, 
                       R = 2000)

hist(boot_cor_comun_DS_DP$t, 
     main = "Distribución bootstrap de la correlación (Salud vs Petición)", 
     xlab = "r", 
     col = "steelblue", 
     border = "white")

hist(boot_cor_comun_DS_DPr$t, 
     main = "Distribución bootstrap de la correlación (Salud vs Proceso)", 
     xlab = "r", 
     col = "steelblue", 
     border = "white")

hist(boot_cor_comun_DPr_DP$t, 
     main = "Distribución bootstrap de la correlación (Proceso vs Petición)", 
     xlab = "r", 
     col = "steelblue", 
     border = "white")

# ---------- Intervalo de confianza bootstrap ----------
tabla_p <- tibble::tibble(
  comparacion = c(
    "salud vs peticion",
    "salud vs proceso",
    "proceso vs peticion"
  ),
  Intervalo = c(
    paste(round(
      boot.ci(boot_cor_comun_DS_DP, type = "perc")$percent[c(4,5)],3
    ),
          collapse = ','),
    paste(round(
      boot.ci(boot_cor_comun_DS_DPr, type = "perc")$percent[c(4,5)],3
    ),
          collapse = ','),
    paste(round(
      boot.ci(boot_cor_comun_DPr_DP, type = "perc")$percent[c(4,5)],3
    ),
          collapse = ',')
  )
)

tabla_p %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Correlación vocabulario total', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

```{r wordcloud_distintas_2023, echo=FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=14, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
frec <- tokens_totales %>% 
  semi_join(
    tokens_totales %>% 
      distinct(word, tema) %>% 
      count(word) %>% 
      filter(n == 1),
    by = "word"
  )  %>% 
  count(word, tema, sort = TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(
    color = case_when(
      tema == "salud" ~ "steelblue",
      tema == "peticion" ~ "darkgreen",
      tema == "proceso" ~ "darkorange"
    )
  )
wordcloud(
  words = frec$word,
  freq = frec$n,
  colors = frec$color,
  max.words = 50
)

```

#### Bigramas

```{r bigramas_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
texto_DS2024_bi <- DS2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DS2024_bi <- texto_DS2024_bi %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = bigram,
    input = text,
    token = "ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  separate(
    bigram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_salud,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_salud
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)

texto_DP2024_bi <- DP2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DP2024_bi <- texto_DP2024_bi %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = bigram,
    input = text,
    token = "ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  separate(
    bigram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_peticion,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_peticion
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)

texto_DPr2024_bi <- DPr2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DPr2024_bi <- texto_DPr2024_bi %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = bigram,
    input = text,
    token = "ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  separate(
    bigram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_proceso,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_proceso
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)



```



##### Salud

```{r bigrama_salud_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
texto_DS2024_bi %>% 
  head(n = 10) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable(caption = 'Top 10 bigramas más frecuentes') %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

```{r grafos_bigrama_salud_2023, echo=FALSE, fig.height=14, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Crear objeto de red a partir de bigramas con peso mayor a 2
g_bi_salud <- texto_DS2024_bi %>%
  filter(weight > 2) %>%
  graph_from_data_frame(directed = FALSE)

V(g_bi_salud)$cluster <- components(graph = g_bi_salud)$membership

# Extraer la componente conexa más grande
gcc_bi_salud <- induced_subgraph(
  graph = g_bi_salud, 
  vids = which(V(g_bi_salud)$cluster == which.max(components(graph = g_bi_salud)$csize))
)

# Configuración de gráficos para mostrar dos visualizaciones
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(1, 1, 2, 1), mgp = c(1, 1, 1))

# Visualización 1: Componente conexa sin peso ajustado
set.seed(123)
plot(
  gcc_bi_salud, 
  layout = layout_with_fr, 
  vertex.color = 1, 
  vertex.frame.color = 1, 
  vertex.size = 3, 
  vertex.label.color = 'black', 
  vertex.label.cex = 0.9, 
  vertex.label.dist = 1
)

# Visualización 2: Componente conexa con tamaño de vértice por fuerza y ancho de borde por peso
set.seed(123)
plot(
  gcc_bi_salud, 
  layout = layout_with_fr, 
  vertex.color = adjustcolor('darkolivegreen4', 0.1), 
  vertex.frame.color = 'darkolivegreen4', 
  vertex.size = 2 + 6 * (log1p(strength(gcc_bi_salud)) / max(log1p(strength(gcc_bi_salud)))), 
  vertex.label.color = 'black', 
  vertex.label.cex = 0.9, 
  vertex.label.dist = 1, 
  edge.width = 3 * E(g_bi_salud)$weight / max(E(g_bi_salud)$weight)
)

# Título para la visualización completa
title(main = "Componente conexa, umbral = 3", outer = TRUE, line = -1)
```

  vertex.size = 2 + 6 * (log1p(strength(gcc_bi_peiticion)) / max(log1p(strength(gcc_bi_peiticion)))),

```{r comparacion_medidas_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
medidas_2024 <- data.frame(
  'Medidas/departamento'=c("Distancia media",
                           "grado medio",
                           "Desviación estándar del grado",
                           "Número de clanes",
                           "Densidad",
                           "Transitividad",
                           "Asortatividad"),
    salud = c(mean_distance(g_bi_salud),
              mean(degree(g_bi_salud)),
              sd(degree(g_bi_salud)),
              count_max_cliques(g_bi_salud),
              edge_density(g_bi_salud),
              transitivity(g_bi_salud),
              assortativity(g_bi_salud, degree(g_bi_salud), 
                            directed = FALSE)),
    peticion = c(mean_distance(g_bi_peticion),
              mean(degree(g_bi_peticion)),
              sd(degree(g_bi_peticion)),
              count_max_cliques(g_bi_peticion),
              edge_density(g_bi_peticion),
              transitivity(g_bi_peticion),
              assortativity(g_bi_peticion, degree(g_bi_peticion), 
                            directed = FALSE)),
  proceso = c(mean_distance(g_bi_proceso),
              mean(degree(g_bi_proceso)),
              sd(degree(g_bi_proceso)),
              count_max_cliques(g_bi_proceso),
              edge_density(g_bi_proceso),
              transitivity(g_bi_proceso),
              assortativity(g_bi_proceso, degree(g_bi_proceso), 
                            directed = FALSE))
  )
  


medidas_2024 %>% 
  kableExtra::kbl(caption='Resultados', 
                  digits=3) %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_minimal()
```

#### Skipgramas

```{r skipgrama_2023, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
texto_DS2024_skip <- DS2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DS2024_skip <- texto_DS2024_skip %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = skipgram,
    input = text,
    token = "skip_ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    num_words = purrr::map_int(skipgram, wordcount)
  ) %>% 
  filter(num_words == 2) %>%  # Mantener solo bigramas
  select(-num_words) %>% 
  separate(
    skipgram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_salud,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_salud
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)

texto_DP2024_skip <- DP2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DP2024_skip <- texto_DP2024_skip %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = skipgram,
    input = text,
    token = "skip_ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    num_words = purrr::map_int(skipgram, wordcount)
  ) %>% 
  filter(num_words == 2) %>%  # Mantener solo bigramas
  select(-num_words) %>% 
  separate(
    skipgram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_peticion,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_peticion
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)

texto_DPr2024_skip <- DPr2023$Resumen %>% 
  str_replace_all("\\s+", " ") %>% 
  str_trim() %>%
  tibble(text = .)
texto_DPr2024_skip <- texto_DPr2024_skip %>%
  unnest_tokens(
    output = skipgram,
    input = text,
    token = "skip_ngrams",
    n = 2
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    num_words = purrr::map_int(skipgram, wordcount)
  ) %>% 
  filter(num_words == 2) %>%  # Mantener solo bigramas
  select(-num_words) %>% 
  separate(
    skipgram,
    into = c("word1", "word2"),
    sep = " ",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("[0-9]", word1),
    !grepl("[0-9]", word2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
  word1 = stri_trans_general(word1, "Latin-ASCII"),
  word2 = stri_trans_general(word2, "Latin-ASCII")
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !word1 %in% mis_stopwords_proceso,
    !word2 %in% mis_stopwords_proceso
  ) %>%
  drop_na(word1, word2) %>%
  count(word1, word2, sort = TRUE) %>%
  rename(weight = n)


```

# Crear objeto de red a partir de bigramas con peso mayor a 2
g_skip_salud <- texto_DS2024_skip %>%
  filter(weight > 4) %>%
  graph_from_data_frame(directed = FALSE)

V(g_skip_salud)$cluster <- components(graph = g_skip_salud)$membership

# Extraer la componente conexa más grande
gcc_skip_salud <- induced_subgraph(
  graph = g_skip_salud, 
  vids = which(V(g_skip_salud)$cluster == which.max(components(graph = g_skip_salud)$csize))
)

# Visualización 1: Componente conexa sin peso ajustado
set.seed(123)
plot(
  gcc_skip_salud, 
  layout = layout_with_fr, 
  vertex.color = 1, 
  vertex.frame.color = 1, 
  vertex.size = 3, 
  vertex.label.color = 'black', 
  vertex.label.cex = 0.9, 
  vertex.label.dist = 1
)

# Visualización 2: Componente conexa con tamaño de vértice por fuerza y ancho de borde por peso
set.seed(123)
plot(
  gcc_skip_salud, 
  layout = layout_with_fr, 
  vertex.color = adjustcolor('darkolivegreen4', 0.1), 
  vertex.frame.color = 'darkolivegreen4', 
  vertex.size = 2 + 6 * (log1p(strength(gcc_skip_salud)) / max(log1p(strength(gcc_skip_salud)))), 
  vertex.label.color = 'black', 
  vertex.label.cex = 0.9, 
  vertex.label.dist = 1, 
  edge.width = 3 * E(g_skip_salud)$weight / max(E(g_skip_salud)$weight)
)

title(main = "Componente conexa, umbral = 5", outer = TRUE, line = -1)
